steps.title: Vertex form of the quadratic
steps.content:
Since the vertex is at $(1,7)$, write the function in vertex form:
$$f(x)=a(x-1)^2+7$$

steps.title: Compute $f(-2)-f(0)$ and select answer
steps.content:
First express $f(-2)$ and $f(0)$ using the vertex form:
$$f(-2)=a(-2-1)^2+7=9a+7$$
$$f(0)=a(0-1)^2+7=a+7$$
Subtract:
$$f(-2)-f(0)=(9a+7)-(a+7)=8a$$
Insert $a=46$:
$$8\times46=368$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
